title: Use technology in Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use technology in Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Apply information literacy skills to meet job needs

pcs.text: Determine nature and extent of information technology needs for Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites work undertaken in accordance with cultural protocols and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine nature and extent of information technology needs for Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites work undertaken in accordance with cultural protocols and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine nature and extent of information technology needs for Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites work undertaken in accordance with cultural protocols and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify the relevant Information Management Systems (IMS) and their applications for Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the relevant Information Management Systems (IMS) and their applications for Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the relevant Information Management Systems (IMS) and their applications for Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural sites.

pcs.text: Develop effective search strategies and use appropriate search tools to locate and record information in applications or programs used by organisation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop effective search strategies and use appropriate search tools to locate and record information in applications or programs used by organisation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop effective search strategies and use appropriate search tools to locate and record information in applications or programs used by organisation.

pcs.text: Follow Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols for accessing and handling cultural material and information, including Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols for accessing and handling cultural material and information, including Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols for accessing and handling cultural material and information, including Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP).

pcs.text: Recognise and apply ICIP, copyright and licensing requirements related to the access and use of cultural material and information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and apply ICIP, copyright and licensing requirements related to the access and use of cultural material and information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and apply ICIP, copyright and licensing requirements related to the access and use of cultural material and information.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Apply information literacy skills to meet job needs

elements.title: Set up and use handheld technology

pcs.text: Identify and set up the basic operating and menu settings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and set up the basic operating and menu settings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and set up the basic operating and menu settings.

pcs.text: Navigate and manipulate the screen environment according to needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Navigate and manipulate the screen environment according to needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Navigate and manipulate the screen environment according to needs.

pcs.text: Customise screen icons and access to applications where applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Customise screen icons and access to applications where applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Customise screen icons and access to applications where applicable.

pcs.text: Use technology to locate and record location and details of the site or cultural landscape, and save and edit the output, where applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use technology to locate and record location and details of the site or cultural landscape, and save and edit the output, where applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use technology to locate and record location and details of the site or cultural landscape, and save and edit the output, where applicable.

pcs.text: Assess the usefulness and relevance of information resources to the site’s work context and client needs and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the usefulness and relevance of information resources to the site’s work context and client needs and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the usefulness and relevance of information resources to the site’s work context and client needs and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Evaluate search results and adjust search strategies to meet information needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate search results and adjust search strategies to meet information needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate search results and adjust search strategies to meet information needs.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Set up and use handheld technology

elements.title: Access and use basic connectivity devices

pcs.text: Connect external digital devices, such as computer devices or storage devices to retrieve, copy, move and save information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Connect external digital devices, such as computer devices or storage devices to retrieve, copy, move and save information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Connect external digital devices, such as computer devices or storage devices to retrieve, copy, move and save information.

pcs.text: Check physical connectivity of computer devices or storage devices to ensure operation and performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check physical connectivity of computer devices or storage devices to ensure operation and performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check physical connectivity of computer devices or storage devices to ensure operation and performance.

pcs.text: Connect printer either through a computer device or directly, set printer settings and print data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Connect printer either through a computer device or directly, set printer settings and print data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Connect printer either through a computer device or directly, set printer settings and print data.

pcs.text: Access audio-visual devices to view and play a multimedia file
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access audio-visual devices to view and play a multimedia file?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access audio-visual devices to view and play a multimedia file.

pcs.text: Use manuals, training booklets and/or online help or helpdesks to overcome basic difficulties with applications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use manuals, training booklets and/or online help or helpdesks to overcome basic difficulties with applications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use manuals, training booklets and/or online help or helpdesks to overcome basic difficulties with applications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Access and use basic connectivity devices

elements.title: Maintain and operate UHF/VHF radio and compass onsite in the context of site work

pcs.text: Confirm radio equipment for communication needs is available on site with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm radio equipment for communication needs is available on site with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm radio equipment for communication needs is available on site with supervisor.

pcs.text: Use radio devices and terminology effectively and correctly to meet communication needs of self and team on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use radio devices and terminology effectively and correctly to meet communication needs of self and team on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use radio devices and terminology effectively and correctly to meet communication needs of self and team on site.

pcs.text: Apply storage and transport requirements for radio and compass equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply storage and transport requirements for radio and compass equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply storage and transport requirements for radio and compass equipment.

pcs.text: Identify a suitable directional compass for orientation needs on-site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify a suitable directional compass for orientation needs on-site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify a suitable directional compass for orientation needs on-site.

pcs.text: Use directional compass in conjunction with a geographical and topographical map to accurately move around onsite and map coordinates
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use directional compass in conjunction with a geographical and topographical map to accurately move around onsite and map coordinates?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use directional compass in conjunction with a geographical and topographical map to accurately move around onsite and map coordinates.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Maintain and operate UHF/VHF radio and compass onsite in the context of site work

elements.title: Maintain knowledge of IMS trends and emerging technologies

pcs.text: Source information about current industry trends and emerging technologies in relation to IMS and data collection methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source information about current industry trends and emerging technologies in relation to IMS and data collection methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source information about current industry trends and emerging technologies in relation to IMS and data collection methods.

pcs.text: Replace used technology consumables in accordance with manufacturer’s instructions and organisational requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Replace used technology consumables in accordance with manufacturer’s instructions and organisational requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Replace used technology consumables in accordance with manufacturer’s instructions and organisational requirements.

pcs.text: Carry out, or arrange for, routine maintenance to ensure equipment is maintained according to organisational requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out, or arrange for, routine maintenance to ensure equipment is maintained according to organisational requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out, or arrange for, routine maintenance to ensure equipment is maintained according to organisational requirements.

pcs.text: Identify equipment faults, perform maintenance in accordance with manufacturer’s instructions or report fault to designated person
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify equipment faults, perform maintenance in accordance with manufacturer’s instructions or report fault to designated person?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify equipment faults, perform maintenance in accordance with manufacturer’s instructions or report fault to designated person.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Maintain knowledge of IMS trends and emerging technologies
